name: A RFID Based Campus Wide Payment System
summary: arXiv:2607.17233v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This work titled "RFID Based Campuswide Payment System" introduces an innovative cashless payment solution for educational institutions. It uses RF...
description: arXiv:2607.17233v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This work titled "RFID Based Campuswide Payment System" introduces an innovative cashless payment solution for educational institutions. It uses RFID cards and a Raspberry Pi to enable hassle free payments for various campus services, such as cafeteria purchases, tuition fees, and library fines. A centralized database ensures real-time updates o...
author: Miraj Uddin Chowdhury, MD Khairul Islam Prime
